name: MixtarRVS CoreV07 RT kernel profile

build.default_source_path: case-sensitive build workspace, normally $HOME/.cache/mixtarrvs-corev07/kernel/src/linux-7.1.2 when the repo is on /mnt/c
build.default_build_path: case-sensitive build workspace, normally $HOME/.cache/mixtarrvs-corev07/kernel/build/linux-7.1.2-mixtar-rt when the repo is on /mnt/c
build.fetch_policy: download stable git snapshot into case-sensitive build workspace; copy final EFI artifact back into repo Generated staging

requirements: output is copied only into staging until explicit install
